mapper.select: SELECT D.*, G.PARTNM, G.STANDARD, G.UNIT, ISNULL(D.INLOTQTY * ISNULL(D.UNIT_PRICE,0), 0) AS AMT, L.LOCATIONNAME FROM TBL_INOUT_WAREHOUSE_DETAIL D LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON D.PARTNO = G.PARTNO LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_LOCATION L ON D.LOCATIONCODE = L.LOCATIONCODE WHERE D.WAREHOUSENUM = #{WAREHOUSENUM} AND D.USEYN = 1 ORDER BY D.WHDETAILNO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_INOUT_WAREHOUSE (WAREHOUSENUM, ORDERNUM, COMPANYCD, INGUBUN, INDAY, INTIME, REGUSERID, REGDTM, PLANTCD, WHSTATE, USEYN) VALUES (#{WAREHOUSENUM}, #{ORDERNUM}, #{COMPANYCD}, #{INGUBUN}, #{INDAY}, #{INTIME}, #{REGUSERID}, GETDATE(), #{PLANTCD}, #{WHSTATE}, 1)

INSERT INTO TBL_INOUT_WAREHOUSE_DETAIL (WAREHOUSENUM, WHDETAILNO, PARTNO, LOTNO, INLOTQTY, USEYN, LOCATIONCODE, INDAY, UNIT_PRICE, FAILQTY, TESTQTY) VALUES (#{WAREHOUSENUM}, #{WHDETAILNO}, #{PARTNO}, #{LOTNO}, #{INLOTQTY}, 1, #{LOCATIONCODE}, #{INDAY}, #{UNIT_PRICE}, 0, 0)
mapper.delete: UPDATE TBL_INOUT_WAREHOUSE SET USEYN = 0, EDITUSERID = #{EDITUSERID}, EDITDTM = GETDATE() WHERE WAREHOUSENUM = #{WAREHOUSENUM}
mapper.select: SELECT 'WH' + FORMAT(GETDATE(),'yyyyMMdd') + '-' + RIGHT('000' + CAST(ISNULL(MAX(CAST(RIGHT(WAREHOUSENUM,3) AS INT)),0)+1 AS VARCHAR), 3) AS NEXTNUM FROM TBL_INOUT_WAREHOUSE WHERE WAREHOUSENUM LIKE 'WH' + FORMAT(GETDATE(),'yyyyMMdd') + '%'

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_INOUT_WAREHOUSE WHERE INDAY = FORMAT(GETDATE(), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AND USEYN=1) as expected_today, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_INOUT_WAREHOUSE WHERE WHSTATE = 'RECEIVED' AND USEYN=1) as in_progress, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_INOUT_WAREHOUSE WHERE WHSTATE = 'QUALITY' AND USEYN=1) as quality_pending
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PROD_LOTSTATE (LOTNO, PARTNO, LOTQTY, UNIT, WAREHOUSECODE, LOCATIONCODE, LOTCREATIONDAY, LOTTYPE, LOTSTATE, REGUSERID, REGDTM, EDITUSERID, EDITDTM, REMARK) VALUES (#{LOTNO}, #{PARTNO}, #{LOTQTY}, 'EA', ISNULL(#{WAREHOUSECODE}, 'WH001'), ISNULL(#{LOCATIONCODE}, 'LOC001'), #{LOTCREATIONDAY}, #{LOTTYPE}, 'GOOD', 1, GETDATE(), 1, GETDATE(), #{REMARK})
INSERT INTO TBL_PROD_STOCK (LOTNO, LOCATIONCODE, STOCKQTY) VALUES (#{LOTNO}, ISNULL(#{LOCATIONCODE}, 'LOC001'), #{LOTQTY})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS REMAIN_CNT FROM TBL_INOUT_PURCHASE_ORDER_DETAIL WHERE ORDERNUM = #{ORDERNUM} AND USEYN = 1 AND ISNULL(INQTY, 0) < ORDERQTY

SELECT 'L' + FORMAT(GETDATE(),'MMdd') + '-' + RIGHT('000' + CAST(ISNULL(MAX(CAST(RIGHT(LOTNO,3) AS INT)),0)+1 AS VARCHAR), 3) AS NEXTLOTNO FROM TBL_PROD_LOTSTATE WHERE LOTNO LIKE 'L' + FORMAT(GETDATE(),'MMdd') + '-%'
SELECT WAREHOUSENUM, ORDERNUM, COMPANYCD, PLANTCD, INGUBUN, WHSTATE FROM TBL_INOUT_WAREHOUSE WHERE WAREHOUSENUM = #{WAREHOUSENUM} AND USEYN = 1
SELECT WAREHOUSENUM, WHDETAILNO, PARTNO, LOTNO, INLOTQTY, LOCATIONCODE FROM TBL_INOUT_WAREHOUSE_DETAIL WHERE WAREHOUSENUM = #{WAREHOUSENUM} AND USEYN = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_INOUT_WAREHOUSE_DETAIL SET USEYN = 0 WHERE WAREHOUSENUM = #{WAREHOUSENUM}
